body:
Felix,

Good to finally connect on this — I've been meaning to loop you in since we crossed paths at the [Breakthrough Energy Summit](events/breakthrough-energy-summit) last month. I'm currently tracking a handful of seed-stage deals in grid-edge AI that I think would fit squarely in your infrastructure thesis, and I'd love to compare notes before either of us moves to term sheet. For what it's worth, [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) is still led day-to-day by [Marcus Teel](people/marcus-teel) as Managing Partner, so he'd need to co-sign on anything north of a $3M check from our side, but I have full autonomy at seed. Let me know if a 30-minute call later this week works — I'm flexible Thursday or Friday afternoon.

Amara
